creator: barzog@telecom.by
text:
It seems that flow-tools is abandoned by developers (latest Changelog 
from 2005). Therefore it should be marked as broken on amd64. (or port 
must be changed to build 32bit version on amd64:)

All users must migrate to flow-tools-ng. Sadly there is same problem on 
amd64, so flow-tools-ng also should be marked as broken on amd64.
http://code.google.com/p/flow-tools/issues/detail?id=9
